title: $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL
text: $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL Specify the URL where the runtime JavaScript and CSS files for Uniface are located. $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL { = } URL Values URL —URL that is used as the base URL for locating the Uniface runtime files. Defaults Assignment file: wasv.asn Section: [WEB] Default value: ../common Description When $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL is defined, Uniface uses this to construct semantic URLs in the HTML link and script definitions in the generated DSP page. If no URL is specified, Uniface uses ../common as the base URL. This URL can be referenced by the $LIBURL expression in the URLs for CSS and JavaScript files. For example, the CSS widget property can specify a CSS file as: $LIBURL/css/syntaxerrors.css . Example: Using $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL For example, if $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL is not defined, the HTML generated for a DSP includes the following URL paths for loading JavaScript and CSS resources: <link type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" href="../common/css/uwindow/uwindow.css" /> <link type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" href="../common/css/ubusyindicator/ubusyindicator.css" /> <link type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" href="../common/css/uapplayout.css" /> ... <script type="text/javascript" src="../common/uniface.js" charset="UTF-8"></script> ... Copy If you set $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL in the wasv.asn file: [WEB] $UNIFACE_RUNTIME_BASE_URL = http://my.cdn/uniface Copy The resulting HTML page contains the following URLs: <link type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" href="http://my.cdn/uniface/css/uwindow/uwindow.css" /> <link type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" href="http://my.cdn/uniface/css/ubusyindicator/ubusyindicator.css" /> <link type="text/css" rel="stylesheet" href="http://my.cdn/uniface/css/uapplayout.css" /> ... <script type="text/javascript" src="http://my.cdn/uniface/uniface.js" charset="UTF-8"></script> ... Copy Related Links CSS DSP widget property that specifies one or more CSS files that are required to style the DSP widget. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
